rationale: Both evaluations scored the candidate identically at 6/10, with the same strengths and the same core concerns (lack of Java/Kotlin, no Spring experience). The wording differences are minor reorderings and rephrasings within ordinary run-to-run variation — the variant even slightly credits 'some experience with Java.' No concern, score change, or shift in reasoning keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Maria Rodriguez.
